title: UriGrantsManagerService grantUriPermissionUnchecked TOCTOU race — grantModes outside lock
notes: findOrCreateUriPermissionLocked runs inside mLock, but grantModes() is called after lock release. revokeUriPermissionLocked runs revokeModes+removal inside lock. Race: thread A gets UriPermission ref inside lock -> releases lock -> thread B revokes+removes the entry inside lock -> thread A calls grantModes on stale object. Permission may persist after revocation.
